ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., Swim Lessons, Sports, Arts & Crafts) */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Detailed schedule of the activity */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the activity */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the activity */,
  "materials_required" TEXT /* Materials required for the activity */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor responsible for the activity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the activity */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* User feedback for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "days" TEXT /* Days of the week the session occurs */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants for the session */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of enrolled participants */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor for the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Active, Canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolling in the activity */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of enrollment (e.g., Active, Waitlist) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee paid for enrollment */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "waitlist_position" INTEGER /* Position on the waitlist if applicable */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date of cancellation if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., parent, participant) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlist" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrollment of the user */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the waitlist */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level on the waitlist */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Notification status (e.g., Notified, Not Notified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlist_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee structure */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity associated with this fee */,
  "base_fee" REAL /* Base fee for enrolling in the activity */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Additional fee for late enrollments */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applicable to the fee */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Current availability status (e.g., Available, Waitlist) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the availability period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the availability period */,
  "capacity_remaining" INTEGER /* Remaining capacity of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_availability_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of expertise or specialization */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the instructor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the communication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., Email, SMS) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the communication */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the communication (e.g., Sent, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
